untranslatable_reason: Signal requires channel-normalized smoothed price (CN operator applied to 4-day LMA with 20-day lookback). The exact channel normalization transformation is not available in the allowed indicator set. Used price_pos_20 (20-day price position/percentile) as the closest proxy, but this does not replicate the LMA(4) smoothing + CN transformation specified in the original signal. The LMA (linearly weighted moving average with period 4) is not in the allowed indicators list.
translation_notes: Interpreted channel-normalized smoothed series crossovers as price position (price_pos_20) threshold crossings at ±1.5 normalized levels. Exit conditions include threshold reversal (as specified) plus directional bias confirmation. ATR-based exit (2 ATR from entry) could not be implemented without entry price tracking. Signal is bidirectional (LONG on upper threshold cross, SHORT on lower threshold cross).
